headline: $6.55 Bn Automotive Dashcam Market by OE and Aftermarket Product Type, Technology, Video Quality, EV Type, Distribution Channel, and Region - Global Forecast to 2033
summary: The automotive dashcam market is set to grow from USD 4.40 billion in 2026 to USD 6.55 billion by 2033, driven by increasing demand for vehicle security and high-resolution recording systems. The EV dashcam market is also expected to grow significantly due to centralized BEV architectures enabling easier electronics integration. The rise in aftermarket demand for Full HD and 4K dashcams highlights a shift towards feature-rich, evidence-grade solutions. Regulatory acceptance in Europe is fueling
